title: Midnight-Craving Peruvian Lamb Seco
description: A rich and flavorful Peruvian lamb stew made with currants, garlic, and spices that's sure to satisfy your midnight cravings. Serve with rice or boiled potatoes to soak up the sauce.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat. Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes. Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant. Add the cumin seeds, coriander, salt, and black pepper and cook for 1 minute, until the spices are fragrant. Add the lamb and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes. Add the currants, vinegar, and enough water to cover the lamb. Bring the mixture to a boil, then cover the pot and transfer it to the oven. Braise the lamb for 2 hours, until tender. Remove the pot from the oven and stir in the cilantro. Serve the lamb hot, garnished with additional cilantro if desired.
